title: Wales first part of UK to mandate solar panels on new buildings

title: VDE Americas upgrades hail risk model for utility-scale solar
summary: VDE Americas has enhanced its Hail Risk Model with updated wind data to improve early warning and tracker stow strategies for utility-scale solar. CEO Brian Grenko explains how the models influence tr

title: Hizenergy launches four-product C&I storage lineup with 300 kW PCS
summary: Hizenergy has introduced a four-product commercial-and-industrial (C&I) energy storage lineup, including a 300 kW low-voltage PCS designed for direct connection to 400 V commercial distribution ne

title: Volkswagen launches first large-scale battery storage project in Germany
summary: Volkswagen has connected its first 20 MW/40 MWh stationary storage system in Salzgitter, Germany, marking the start of its plan to integrate battery production, storage, and energy trading within a si

title: Netherlands hits record electricity production and exports in 2025
summary: The Netherlands set a record in 2025, generating 132 billion kWh of electricity, up 10% from 2024, with renewables supplying 49% of output and exports rising 25% to 30 billion kWh.

title: Gas-fired electricity two to three times costlier than renewable backups

title: Longi launches fire-resistant solar module for rooftop PV
summary: The Chinese manufacturer has launched a fire-resistant version of its Hi-MO X10 module for distributed PV applications, featuring back-contact technology and up to 24.8% efficiency. The company says t

title: Financial sponsors increasingly back European battery storage platforms
summary: Battery energy storage systems (BESS) are now an investable asset class, and infrastructure funds are acquiring developer platforms and financing large portfolios to accelerate deployment across Europ

title: Involtics unveils GTSI single-phase hybrid inverter for homes
summary: India-based Involtics has launched its GTSI series of single-phase hybrid inverters in 3 kW, 3.6 kW, 5 kW and 6 kW sizes for residential solar systems.

title: TOPCon solar modules show self-healing under UV stress
summary: Researchers from Nanchang University and Trina Solar found that TOPCon solar modules exhibit metastable “degradation–recovery” under UV exposure, with light soaking fully restoring performance and no

title: Argentina launches 700MW/2,800MWh BESS tender
summary: The Argentinian Government has launched a new battery energy storage system (BESS) tender seeking 700MW and 4-hour duration.

title: Long-duration tech still outcompeted by lithium, trade group advocates for ‘valuing diversity’
summary: Global long-duration energy storage (LDES) deployment figures soared in 2025, but newer technologies risk being outcompeted by the incumbent, lithium-ion (Li-ion).

title: IPP Econergy’s head of energy storage talks pipeline, financing, Germany, procurement and pricing
summary: Joshua Murphy, head of energy storage for IPP Econergy, sat down with Energy-Storage.news for a video interview to discuss various business and financial topics at the Energy Storage Summit 2026 in Lo

title: Base Power launches 100MW VPP programme in Texas
summary: Residential energy storage startup Base Power is collaborating with utility Denton County Electric Cooperative (CoServ) to deploy 100MW of residential energy storage across North Texas, US.

title: From software to shareholder: Flower, Volkswagen’s Elli and Nuvve launch Germany &  Sweden BESS projects
summary: Software and optimisation firms Flower, Volkswagen's Elli and Nuvve have progressed large-scale BESS projects under own-and-operate models; Flower and Elli in Germany and the latter in Sweden.

title: Octopus Australia breaks ground on 486MWh Blind Creek Solar Farm and Battery project
summary: Octopus Australia has broken ground on the 486MWh Blind Creek Solar Farm and Battery site in New South Wales (NSW).

title: Australia: NSW planners approve 400MWh Burroway solar-plus-storage despite community objections
summary: The NSW Independent Planning Commission has approved Edify Energy's 400MWh Burroway solar-plus-storage project in Australia.

title: Hanjung America to build ESS manufacturing facility in Indiana to support StarPlus Energy
summary: Hanjung America, a subsidiary of South Korea-based battery manufacturer Hanjung NCS, will build its first US energy storage system (ESS) manufacturing facility in Huntington, Indiana, US.

title: US import tariffs ‘increase the policy risk’ for BESS
summary: Energy-Storage.news speaks with Isshu Kikuma, energy storage analyst at BloombergNEF (BNEF), ahead of the upcoming Energy Storage Summit USA.

title: EU ‘Made in Europe’ regulation welcomed but ‘will not remove dependency on China’
summary: A European Commission (EC) proposal to add domestic content requirements for energy storage will ‘significantly impact’ the industry but may not reduce overall dependence on China.
